research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Quinidine blocks multiple cardiac currents (IKr, INa, IKs); historical antiarrhythmic with QT prolongation risk.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Multi-current framing is well established for quinidine. Citations are real but not machine-validated. No falsifier discipline.
